articles.title: Meta mercifully spun out VR fitness game Supernatural instead of just killing it - TechCrunch
articles.description: Meta appears to have listened to the Supernatural users who protested the app's sad fate after sweeping layoffs.
articles.content: Meta’s attempt to pioneer a metaverse and make VR cool totally flopped, except for one shining diamond in the rough: Supernatural, a VR fitness game that made working out feel fun and accessible. Now… [+2309 chars]
